nodes.name: Check Existing Submission
nodes.notes: Column AY (index 50) holds Submission ID (internal) — the idempotency key.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, bookingId: $json.existingBookingId, status: $json.existingStatus, calendarEventLink: $json.existingCalendarLink, googleMeetLink: $json.existingMeetLink } }}
={{ { success: false, code: 'SLOT_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE', message: 'That time was just booked. Please choose another available time.' } }}

nodes.name: Compute Meeting Window
nodes.notes: Turns meetingDate + meetingTime (e.g. '2:00 PM') + timezone into ISO instants for the Calendar nodes, using the IANA offset at that date (DST-safe) rather than the server's local time zone.

nodes.name: Google Calendar: Final Recheck
nodes.notes: Raw Calendar API call — n8n's native Calendar getAll node was found to intermittently ignore timeMin/timeMax filtering in this instance, so conflict checks go direct to the API instead.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { requests: [ { deleteDimension: { range: { sheetId: 1371187945, dimension: 'ROWS', startIndex: $json.rowNumber - 1, endIndex: $json.rowNumber } } } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: false, code: 'SLOT_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE', message: 'That time was just booked. Please choose another available time.' } }}

nodes.name: Build Booking Row
nodes.notes: Column order must exactly match the Bookings sheet header row (A-BA).

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $('Has Conflict?').first().json;
const ev = $('Google Calendar: Create Event + Meet').first().json;
const row = [
  j.bookingId, j.submittedAt, "Standard Strategy Call", "Pending",
  j.meetingDate, j.meetingTime, j.meetingEndLabel, j.timezone,
  j.fullName, j.email, j.phone, "",
  j.businessName, j.businessWebsite || "", j.serviceInterest, j.budgetRange,
  j.projectDetails, j.leadSource, j.leadSourceOther || "", j.preferredContactMethod || "",
  (j.additionalParticipants || []).join(", "), j.agreementAccepted, j.agreementVersion, j.agreementTimestamp,
  "No", "Yes", ev.htmlLink || "", ev.hangoutLink || "",
  ev.id || "", "No", "No", "No",
  "", "", "", "",
  new Date().toISOString(), "automation", "website",
  j.utmSource || "", j.utmMedium || "", j.utmCampaign || "", j.utmContent || "", j.utmTerm || "",
  j.pageUrl || "", j.referrer || "", j.ipAddress || "", j.userAgent || "",
  "1.0.0", "", j.submissionId, "", 0
];
return [{ json: { row, bookingId: j.bookingId, rowNumber: j.rowNumber, calendarEventLink: ev.htmlLink, googleMeetLink: ev.hangoutLink } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { requests: [ { deleteDimension: { range: { sheetId: 1371187945, dimension: 'ROWS', startIndex: $('Build Booking Row').item.json.rowNumber - 1, endIndex: $('Build Booking Row').item.json.rowNumber } } } ] } }}

nodes.name: Telegram: Notify Team
nodes.notes: Attach the Telegram Bot credential in n8n. Chat ID comes from TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var.

parameters.subject: =New Velor Strategy Call — {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.businessName }} — {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingDate }} {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingTime }}
parameters.message:

parameters.subject: =Your Velor Strategy Call — {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingDate }} at {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingTime }} ET

=

Hi {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.fullName.split(' ')[0] }},

Your strategy call with Velor has been received and scheduled.

Meeting details
Date: {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingDate }}
Time: {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.meetingTime }} ET
Format: Online video meeting
Google Meet: {{ $('Google Calendar: Create Event + Meet').item.json.hangoutLink }}
Booking ID: {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.bookingId }}

We will review the information you submitted before the meeting so we can come prepared to discuss the right system for your business.

You are interested in: {{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.serviceInterest }}

What you told us:
{{ $('Conflict Detected?').item.json.projectDetails }}

Need to make a change? Reply to this email and include your booking ID.

Velor Digital — We build businesses that run smoother.
velordigital.com

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { values: [ [ $now.toISO(), $('Build Booking Row').item.json.bookingId, $execution.id, 'WORKFLOW_COMPLETED', 'success', 1, '', $('Verify Signature & Parse Input').item.json.submissionId, '1.0.0' ] ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, bookingId: $('Build Booking Row').item.json.bookingId, status: 'Pending', calendarEventLink: $('Build Booking Row').item.json.calendarEventLink, googleMeetLink: $('Build Booking Row').item.json.googleMeetLink, conflictDetected: false } }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Add Attendees
nodes.notes: Attendees are patched in separately via the raw Calendar API — the native node's attendees field shape is unreliable across versions.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { attendees: [ { email: $('Has Conflict?').item.json.email }, ...(($('Has Conflict?').item.json.additionalParticipants) || []).map(e => ({ email: e })), { email: 'ishaatlabib.1@gmail.com' } ] } }}

nodes.name: Extract Booking Row Number
nodes.notes: Parses the Sheets append response (e.g. "Bookings!A3:BA3") to get the real row number, so the notification-sent flags can be marked Yes immediately after a successful send instead of waiting for the retry workflow.

nodes.name: HTTP: Mark Notifications Sent
nodes.notes: Marks AD/AE/AF Yes right after the client email send succeeds, so the retry workflow does not needlessly resend on its next pass.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'Bookings!AD' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AD' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] }, { range: 'Bookings!AE' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AE' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] }, { range: 'Bookings!AF' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AF' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] } ] } }}
